---
title: White papers
author: ~
date: '2044-12-31'
slug: white-papers
categories: []
tags: []
description: My white-papers
---

- Burleigh, T. J. & Glimcher, P. G. (2017). Building the next generation of early warning systems in education. [[PDF]]("/pubs/Burleigh & Glimcher - 2017 - Next-Gen Early Warning Systems.pdf")

- Burleigh, T. J. & Glimcher, P. G. (2017). Finding the best fit: Building a novel student-school compatibility tool to improve school choice. [[PDF]]("/pubs/Burleigh & Glimcher - 2017 - Finding the Best Fit.pdf")
